UGC / Approvals UGC approved · IQAC active UGC · AICTE · NIRF submitted UGC approved · CPE status renewed 2016–17 UGC CPE (X & XI plan) · AICTE UGC approved
Institutional Status Autonomous (Affiliated OU) University College (JNTUH) State University (since 2022) Autonomous (UGC 1988–89) Constituent College (OU)
Established 1971 1972 (JNTUH) 1924 Oldest in group 1887 Oldest college 1947
Course & Fees
BBA Course Name BBA (offered under autonomous curriculum) BBA (Data Analytics) BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration) BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration) BBA (Analytics)
Course Type Regular / Govt. Self Financed Regular Self Financed Self Financed
Annual Fee (approx.) Very low — govt. fees + reimbursement eligible ₹1,09,500/yr
Tuition ₹1,00,000 · Special ₹5,500 · Exam ₹3,000 · Other ₹1,000		 ₹46,250/yr
Tuition ₹1,400 · Special ₹33,000 · Exam ₹4,250 · Other ₹7,600		 ₹40,425/yr
Tuition ₹22,000 · Special ₹2,600 · Exam ₹3,700 · Other ₹12,125		 ₹40,551/yr
Tuition ₹33,275 · Special ₹3,396 · Exam ₹3,880
Fee Reimbursement Yes — TS govt. scheme Not applicable (self-financed) Yes — for eligible categories Partial scholarships available Yes — TS govt. scheme
Medium English English English English / Telugu / Hindi English
CBCS / Credit System CBCS framework JNTUH curriculum CBCS (Choice Based Credit System) Autonomous syllabus (own BoS) CBCS (OU)
Campus & Infrastructure
Campus Size Compact urban campus, Begumpet 89 acres, Kukatpally 42 acres — heritage Koti Residency (built 1803) 25 acres, Basheerbagh City campus, Secunderabad
Laboratories Science & computer labs; well-maintained per student reviews Extensive labs; 93,441-book central library; 187 journal subscriptions Science & computer labs; cyber centre (40 systems + 4 differently-abled) Computer, Zoology, Botany, Chemistry labs; digital library Computer labs; 56,000-book library; 20 journals
Computers / IT Computer labs; WiFi; JKC nodal centre (skill training) Strong IT infra; WiFi; 93k library books; 187 journal subs 40 computer systems; 4 for differently abled; WiFi 10+ library computers; computer lab; WiFi Computer labs; WiFi campus
Library Digital library; well-stocked per reviews Central library — 93,441 books; 187 print journals Library with digital & print resources 140+ seating; 10+ computers; books, journals, e-resources, book bank 56,000 books; 20 subject journals; 15 magazines; 12 newspapers
Hostel Not prominently listed Boys & girls hostels 865 UG seats; free for economically challenged Boys: 188 rooms · Girls: 71 rooms Gnana Gangotri (boys) & CHW4 (girls)
Health Centre Yes (per NIRF) Yes Full-time dispensary; regular doctor Free medical treatment for students; gym Regular doctor; health camps with hospitals
Auditorium Seminar halls Conference & seminar halls Auditorium AC auditorium (200 capacity) Seminar hall
Canteen Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes
Student Life & Extracurriculars
Gender Women only Co-educational Women only Co-educational Co-educational
NCC Yes (per student reviews) NSS active; NCC not listed separately for mgmt. college NCC & NSS — physical educators on staff NCC & NSS units on campus NCC & NSS both active
Sports Sports grounds; well-maintained; sports admission quota Extensive — 89-acre campus; gym; strong sports culture; sports quota Sports facilities; inter-university participation; physical educators Grounds; gym (boys & girls); sports admission quota Cricket, volleyball, throwball, softball, basketball, kabaddi, shuttle & more
Cultural Festivals Annual day; national & international conferences; Golden Jubilee (2021) Annual tech & cultural fests; hackathons; vibrant campus life Cultural clubs; IWD & Republic Day celebrations; women empowerment events Annual day; Bathukamma; freshers; farewell; October cultural festival Literature, fine arts, cultural programmes; NCC/NSS events
Technical Symposiums State-level Jignasa project competition; national & international conferences; FDPs Active — engineering university; hackathons, tech events, industry talks State & national-level seminars; research participation Academic conferences; IQAC events; UGC-sponsored seminars Academic seminars; student study projects
Alumni Network Active alumni; women leaders in Telangana; Golden Jubilee celebrated 2021 Strong — premier tech university; MNC alumni globally; 50+ yr history Oldest women's institution in Telangana (1924); notable women leaders Strongest — est. 1887; notable alumni incl. T. Subbarami Reddy; 139-yr legacy Established OU network (OU founded 1918); 75+ yr college history
Placements & Career
Placement Cell Yes — JKC Nodal Centre (Hyd & RR districts) Yes — dedicated placement cell Yes — industry interface cell Yes — TASK-registered placement cell Yes — training & placement cell
Students Placed (NIRF 2025) 286 students placed 534 / 1,106 UG students (48%); 706 / 830 PG (85%) ~70–80% annually (student reviews) 238 / 830 UG (NIRF 2024); 93% PG placement rate Data not separately published
Median UG Package Not published separately ₹9.4 LPA (engineering UG); BBA separate ₹3–5 LPA (student reviews) ₹4.2 LPA (NIRF 2025) Not published
Top Recruiters JKC-linked industry tie-ups; skill & aptitude training Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Oracle, Cognizant, Accenture, MathWorks Infosys, TCS, Deloitte, Dr Reddy's, Novartis, HDFC Bank, Vivifi, Innovacx Accenture, Genpact, Infosys, Wipro, Kotak, Amazon, TCL OU-network companies (campus drives)
Pre-placement Training JKC — aptitude, soft skills, computer skills Industry grooming sessions; seminars; webinars Career guidance; industry interface Soft skills, CV writing, aptitude, mock interviews (TASK) Training & placement cell programmes
Location & Accessibility
Location Opp. HPS, Begumpet, Hyd – 500016 Kukatpally, Hyd – 500085 Sultan Bazar, Koti, Hyd – 500095 Opp. LB Stadium, Basheerbagh, Hyd – 500001 Sardar Patel Rd, Secunderabad – 500003
Nearest Metro Begumpet stn. (walking distance) JNTU Metro (Red line) — ~6 km Nampally / Kachiguda (nearby) LB Stadium Metro — very central Secunderabad metro corridor
Nearest Railway Stn. Begumpet Rly. Stn. — walking distance Bharat Nagar — ~7 km; Lingampally — ~9 km Nampally / Kachiguda — close Hyderabad / Nampally — ~2 km Secunderabad Rly. Stn. — very close
Bus Connectivity TSRTC buses; near HUDA Complex JNTU Bus Station; Kukatpally depot Koti bus stop — central Hyderabad hub Multiple TSRTC routes; near JBS Near JBS Secunderabad; excellent connectivity
Distance from Airport ~30 km, ~40 min ~47 km, ~50 min ~30 km, ~40 min ~30 km, ~40 min ~32 km, ~40 min
Overall Accessibility
★★★★★
Best — city centre with rly. & metro
★★★
★★
Suburban; metro available but far from centre
★★★★
★
Central city; busy but well-connected
★★★★★
Very central; walkable to LB Stadium metro
★★★★★
Best — near Secunderabad rly. & JBS
Quick Verdict
Best For Best overall for women — highest NAAC, lowest fees, central location, skill training Tech-forward BBA Data Analytics; students who can afford ₹1.1 L/yr and want a university brand Women seeking a university-level degree with free hostel and strong placement % Brand name, alumni network, placements via TASK; best co-ed option Co-ed, modern BBA Analytics specialisation, very affordable, excellent Secunderabad access
Watch Out For High competition for seat; no hostel listed High fees; JNTU brand benefit mostly in engineering, not BBA Busy Koti area; recent university upgrade means less established BBA track record Most recent NAAC cycle returned B++ (2.92); verify current grade before applying Non-autonomous; no independent NIRF rank; weaker placement data
Sources: NAAC official portal · NIRF 2025 · Careers360 · CollegeDunia · Official college websites · DOST 2026 portal (dost.cgg.gov.in) Prepared June 2026 · For personal use — verify fees & seats at dost.cgg.gov.in before submitting web options
